crime.value: Decapitation murder of teenage girl in apartment
crime.quote: Caroline's head rolled off and she fell off the stool. The blood was everywhere.

victim.value: Caroline, 15-year-old aspiring fashion designer, beloved by neighbors
victim.quote: Only fifteen and she could already draw like an adult. Everyone loved Caroline

closed_world.quote: the small apartment that they both hated so much

red_herring.value: Initial suggestion that poverty and circumstances might explain the tragedy, misdirecting from true cause
red_herring.quote: Maybe she finally got a real job. Maybe they could finally afford clothes, shoes, furniture

clue_fairness.value: The severed head reveal is presented to reader simultaneously with the mother's discovery
clue_fairness.quote: Caroline's head rolled off and she fell off the stool. The blood was everywhere.

social_world.value: Economic desperation - overworked mother, unpaid bills, run-down apartment, financial instability
social_world.quote: She was just tired and overworked... cursing herself for not paying the power company on time

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical discovery through touch - the shoulder contact that causes the severed head to roll
reveal_mechanic.quote: her hand stretch forward and rest on her daughters shoulder. Caroline's head rolled off

media_and_audience.value: Story framed as psychiatric testimony from schizophrenic patient at hospital
media_and_audience.quote: Only later Caroline would come to a schizophrenic little girl at her fourth hospital visit

investigator_wound.value: Mother's love and hope for her daughter's future destroyed by discovering the murder
investigator_wound.quote: the one person she was sure she still loved was gone
